title: Google Maps API missing on Edit Deal address field
desc: When editing a deal from the Deal Command Center, the address field has no Google Maps API — autocomplete unavailable.

title: Deal stage not defaulting to "In Draft" when proposal created from deal
desc: When a proposal is created from a deal, the stage should auto-set to "In Draft." Currently does not reset.

title: Job address not updating in deal/contact record after proposal creation
desc: After creating a proposal from a deal, the job address fails to propagate back to the deal and contact record.

title: Deal card link display incorrect after filter applied
desc: When a filter is created in the Sales Pipeline, deal card links display incorrectly.

title: Menu not expanding properly on Android
desc: The navigation menu is not expanding on Android devices.

title: Production rate duplication not copying ceiling measurement correctly
desc: When duplicating an area (e.g. Lanai Ceiling), the square footage does not copy correctly.

title: Bad phone number in contact blocks deal channel rendering
desc: An invalid phone number format prevents the deal channel from rendering. Even after fixing the number, channel remains inaccessible.

title: Endless spinner when adding production rates to account
desc: Adding production rates results in an infinite loading spinner — save never completes.

title: Change order addition does not auto-refresh screen
desc: When a change order line item is added on an accepted/scheduled proposal, the screen requires a hard refresh.

title: Invalid email shows "opted out" error instead of "invalid email"
desc: When an email hard bounces, the system incorrectly shows an opt-out message. Should display "invalid email."

title: Save button still visible on mobile deal card
desc: The Save button remains visible on the mobile deal card when it should be hidden.

title: Salesperson keywords not replacing in Receipt Email & Confirmation SMS
desc: {current-user-name}, {salesperson-name}, and {salesperson-first-name} not being replaced in specific templates.

title: "Submitted on" timestamp incorrect on proposals
desc: Submitted-on timestamp is significantly off from the actual received time.

title: Google Maps API not working on customer portal address field
desc: On the customer portal booking form, Google Maps API is not functioning on the address input.

title: "No drips left" incorrectly showing on every deal card
desc: After a recent update, every deal card shows 'no drips left' — urgent regression affecting all users.
notes: Jeremy in Slack: 'Oh wait! I already did this! I'll update the existing ticket and change status.' Linked ClickUp 86b4j3jgj. Product had already submitted and owned this ticket before Tanner raised it in the channel.

title: Closing ratio and Jobs Won showing 0 in weekly metrics
desc: Closing ratio and Jobs Won count displaying 0 in weekly dashboard view even when jobs are confirmed closed.

title: "End time" not showing when appointment is rescheduled
desc: When rescheduling an appointment, the end time field is not populated or displayed.

title: Error when clicking activity item; raw error code exposed to customers
desc: Clicking an activity item throws an error. Raw error code also exposed on customer-facing proposal page.
notes: Jeremy replied in Slack: 'This is a known issue; we have a ticket for it.' Linked existing ClickUp 86b4xyb8c (High / In Progress). Was already being tracked before Tanner raised it.

title: Cancel button does not close drip editor on unsaved drips
desc: In the drip builder, clicking Cancel does not close the editor when the drip has never been saved.

title: Deal stage resets when email is invalid during proposal send
desc: When proposal send fails due to an invalid email, the deal stage resets — causing data loss.

title: Internal lead sources not rendering in lead source dropdown
desc: Custom/internal lead sources are missing from the dropdown when creating a new proposal for an existing customer.
notes: Jeremy submitted a full ClickUp ticket (86b88wc0z) for this issue — scoped to Onsite Estimate scheduler and Contact Record lead source dropdown. Product had already documented and owned this before it was raised in the channel.

title: Duplicate proposal incorrectly moves to "accepted" state immediately
desc: Duplicating a proposal in Jobs Pipeline skips to accepted state instead of starting In Draft.

title: "Mark all notifications as read" not working
desc: The mark-all-as-read function fails. Individual mark-as-read and gear icon method both work.

title: "Jobs Won" dashboard filter using wrong data field
desc: Jobs Won filter was using wrong field — returning 0 even with confirmed closed jobs.

title: Amount showing $0 on deal movement modal
desc: The dollar amount on the deal movement modal shows $0 instead of the actual deal value.

title: Duplicate invoices generated 3x for same transaction
desc: A CCK Admin account had 3 duplicate invoices created simultaneously, triggering 3 thank-you emails. Related to drip sender bug.
resolvedNote: Pushed to production — 86b5dmpnw (Prime Choice Flooring fix)

title: Drip emails/messages being sent multiple times
desc: Drips triggered and sent multiple times due to drip sender issue. Partial fix deployed; full audit needed.
resolvedNote: Addressed via drip sender fix — partial resolution confirmed

title: Invoice send options missing on iPhone (present on Android/Desktop)
desc: Invoice action dropdown options visible on Android/Desktop but missing on iPhone.

title: Photo preview not rendering properly on uploaded photos
desc: Uploaded photo previews are not displaying correctly in the attachment viewer.

title: Deal timestamp shows deal age instead of time sold
desc: The timestamp on won deals reflects deal age rather than when it was marked sold.

title: Lead received as 3 duplicate entries via webhook
desc: A lead was received 3 duplicate times. Needs diagnosis and should be added to the contact merging ticket.

title: Reset button formatting broken on Mac 13-inch
desc: The Reset button has a display issue specifically on 13-inch Mac screens.

title: Schedule Job button missing from deal card on completed jobs
desc: Schedule Job button is hidden when a job is completed, even though multi-stage projects need re-scheduling.

title: PM not listed correctly when scheduling job; shown as salesperson
desc: When scheduling a job with a PM assigned, the PM appears as the salesperson and salesperson attribution is also wrong.

title: Blast messages not appearing in Blast reporting table
desc: Blast messages sent from Sales/Jobs list do not show in the Blast table with data, open rates, etc.
resolvedNote: Pushed to production — 86b7huhpk (Jobs List & Pipeline Enhancement)

title: New proposal/appointment modal load times are high
desc: New proposal and new appointment modals have high load times, likely due to template fetching.

title: Phone number text input has broken behavior
desc: Phone number input field has broken/unusual behavior per Loom — likely a mask or formatting bug.

title: Job report not loading on job detail page
desc: The Job Report section fails to load when navigating to a specific job's detail page.

title: Add "Secret Work Order URL" to proposal dropdown options
desc: Add Secret Work Order URL as a selectable option in proposal builder dropdowns. Work shipped without this being included.
resolvedNote: Completed in another ticket from previous January
notes: Jeremy in Slack: 'We have this ticket' + linked ClickUp 86b3cz2u7. Also noted: 'We had a ticket built & ready to go — the work happened without our knowing about it.' Product owned the ticket; work shipped outside of process.

title: Hide job stages in Sales Pipeline and sales stages in Jobs Pipeline
desc: After manual acceptance shipped, job stages should not appear in Sales Pipeline and vice versa. Should have been part of that release.
notes: Jesus replied in Slack with screenshots showing this WAS ALREADY the current behavior. Tanner confirmed: 'yes confirmed.' Product had already handled this as part of manual acceptance — not a miss.

title: Manual acceptance message copy is incorrect
desc: The manual acceptance message has wrong copy. Should read: "This proposal was accepted on behalf of the customer manually without a signature by {company-name}."

title: API deal creation: first salesperson assignment logic is wrong
desc: When a deal is created via API, the logic for assigning the first salesperson is incorrect.

title: Proposal PDFs should include CompanyCam and attached photos
desc: Proposal PDFs should pull in CompanyCam and internal attachment photos for a complete customer deliverable.

title: Remove 12:00 AM timestamps from all-day calendar events
desc: All-day events should not show a 12:00 AM timestamp. Default end time should draw from Settings (5:00 PM).

title: Company logo in drip emails should link to company website, not DripJobs.com
desc: When a company logo is clicked in a drip email, it should redirect to the company's website, not dripjobs.com.

title: New users added to DripJobs should receive a sign-in welcome email
desc: When a new user is added to a DripJobs account, they should automatically receive a welcome email with a login link.

title: Duplicate proposal modal must warn that a new deal will be created
desc: The duplicate proposal modal must clearly indicate this action creates a new deal, not staying within the current one.

title: Drip builder: cannot save multiple drips at once in a sequence
desc: Users can edit multiple drips in a row but can only save one at a time — major UX failure when building sequences.

title: Chargebee paused subscription should deactivate DripJobs account
desc: When a Chargebee subscription is paused (seasonal), DripJobs account should auto-deactivate and re-activate when subscription resumes.
notes: Jeremy in Slack: 'We have this one already.' Linked ClickUp 86b49mbb6 (Ready for Dev / Basit). Product had already scoped, documented, and queued this for development before it was raised in the channel.

title: Billing modal launcher for cancelled accounts
desc: Create a billing modal launcher for cancelled accounts so they can be prompted to re-activate from within the app.

title: Mobile Task UI improvements
desc: General improvements to the task UI on mobile — layout, spacing, and field usability.

title: SMS Disabled screen: update header and feature copy
desc: Replace the red SMS Disabled bar. New header: "Text Your Leads & Contacts." Updated subline with feature bullet points.

title: Activation email drip sequence at 24/48/72hrs for inactive signups
desc: If a company has not activated within 24 hours of signup, send drip emails at 24, 48, and 72 hours with onboarding links.

title: Add Event Assignee field to appointment/event creation modal
desc: The event modal should include an Event Assignee field. For on-site estimates show Salesperson label.

title: Production rate duplication: allow user to set quantity of copies
desc: When duplicating an area in Production Rates, let the user specify how many copies they want in one action.

title: Improved DripJobs Chat onboarding flow after feature activation
desc: Show chat widget in side panel (feature-locked), replace SMS disabled banner with Complete A2P CTA, update deal info state.

title: Zapier: "Send Chat Message to Contact" action
desc: Create a Zapier action that allows users to send a DripJobs chat message to a contact via Zap.

title: Postmark: route email replies into DripJobs deal activity
desc: Route Postmark replies into DripJobs via reply-to email. Store on backend. Surface in deal activity. Option to pause drips on reply.

title: Create Bookkeeper user role (contacts & invoices access only)
desc: A new restricted role that limits access to only Contacts and Invoices modules.

title: Store and version proposal history — save PDF snapshot on each send
desc: Every time a proposal is sent, save a version/PDF snapshot so previous states can be reviewed.

title: Invoice bar on deal card should be clickable (like proposal bar)
desc: Make the invoice line item bar on the deal card clickable for direct navigation to the invoice.

title: Indicator on deal cards for proposals scheduled to send
desc: Display a visual flag on deal cards when a proposal is scheduled to send. Flag exists in system — needs to surface on card.
notes: Jeremy in Slack: 'We actually already have a ticket for this one.' Linked ClickUp 86b3w2j2m. When Tanner raised this request, Product already had it documented and in the backlog.

title: Date filter on Change Order table
desc: Add a date range filter to the Change Order table for better auditing.

title: Job Type Labels — label engine on job record level
desc: Build a label engine so users can tag jobs by type (interior, exterior, cabinets, remodel, etc.) for filtering and reporting.
resolvedNote: Did Customer Success Activation Tracking (90-Day Milestone) instead

title: Surface Job Type Labels on mobile deal and job card views
desc: Once built, show Job Type Labels on mobile deal card and job card views.

title: Invoice due reminders + Change Order reminders engine
desc: Build 2 new reminder engines: Invoice Due Reminders and Change Order Reminders, following the appointment/job reminder pattern.

title: "Schedule Again" button on completed job deal cards
desc: Add a Schedule Again button on completed job deal cards that triggers the Schedule Job function. High business value for multi-stage projects.

title: Enhanced Schedule Job modal with full job context
desc: Redesign the Schedule Job modal to show job amount, crew name, work order options, start/end dates, and all calendar-visible fields.

title: Enhanced Duplicate Proposal flow with deal assignment and stage selection
desc: Redesign duplicate proposal: select current/new/existing contact; choose In Draft or Project Accepted; assign to deal; pre-fill salesperson/crew.

title: Drip builder: block duplicate drips at same time interval
desc: Prevent users from creating a second drip at the same time interval. Prompt them to use the Text+Email toggle on the existing drip.

title: Assign CompanyCam photos to specific proposal line items/areas
desc: Allow users to assign specific CompanyCam photos to individual line items and substrate areas in a proposal.
notes: Jeremy in Slack: 'I actually have a FeatureBase ticket from Feb for this. I'll update it with new details.' Product had been tracking this since February — two months before Tanner raised it in April.

title: Chargebee trial add-on for AI Feature
desc: Set up a Chargebee trial add-on for the DripJobs AI Feature.

title: Info icon on internal lead sources with better help text
desc: Add an info icon on internal lead sources with clearer help text explaining their purpose and use cases.

title: Search tenants page by Chargebee ID
desc: Add a search field on the Tenants admin page for searching by Chargebee subscription ID.

title: Match appointment header font to Sales Pipeline style
desc: Appointment headers in the new Calendar should match the font/text style used in the Sales Pipeline.

title: Reorder Integrations page (Acorn first, then Zapier, CompanyCam)
desc: Reorder integrations: Row 1: Acorn, Zapier, CompanyCam. Row 2: Quickbooks, Angi Leads. People can't find the Acorn financing widget.

title: Friendly error page on customer-facing proposal errors — no raw code
desc: Replace raw error code with friendly message. Show company logo (not DripJobs). Remove broken Contact Us and Dashboard buttons.

title: Proposal "Accepted" badge spacing fix
desc: The spacing around the Accepted badge on proposals is off — minor UI correction needed.

title: Contact and Lead Score Logging for analytics
desc: Log dates/times of contact and lead score changes to enable filtering by recency.

title: Auto-pause drips when a change is requested on a proposal
desc: When a proposal has Change Requested status, automatically pause active drips for that deal.

title: Text message response rate % per drip in reporting
desc: Surface a text message response rate % metric per individual drip in the reporting dashboard.

title: Expose proposal count in Jobs list for closing rate audit
desc: Proposal count is tracked in the system — surface it in the Jobs list so the team can calculate closing rates.

title: Quick Job — create proposal, accept, and invoice in one flow
desc: In Jobs Schedule, add "New Job" button. User inputs contact, amount, address, dates. System auto-creates a proposal, marks it accepted, and creates an invoice in one shot.

title: Customer portal: add email validation on booking form
desc: Add client-side and server-side email validation to the customer portal booking form.

title: Multi-day calendar events: auto-flag all-day, support start/end time, remove toggle
desc: Auto-flag as all-day if dates differ. Remove the toggle. Support start/end time input for multi-day events.

title: Acorn financing widget: right-align on desktop
desc: The financing widget should be right-aligned on desktop. Currently spreading full-width.
notes: Jeremy replied in Slack: 'We changed it to that at your request, so that it fit mobile better. When it was smaller and on the right, it got bunched up when moving to mobile.' Tanner acknowledged: 'yeah... i mean it's fine.' This was a deliberate design decision made at Tanner's prior request — not a miss.

title: Payment failed banner with failure state indicator
desc: When a payment fails, display a banner similar to the update-payment-info banner, with an appropriate CTA.

title: Attachments/images on mobile should expand to full-screen view
desc: Tapping an attachment on mobile should open a full-screen view with a close button.
resolvedNote: No Fix Needed: library for that editor was updated and seemed to fix the freezing and enabling the picture to go full screen

title: Notification settings: support multiple email addresses
desc: Give users the ability to set who receives notification emails, with support for adding multiple addresses.

title: Clean up duplicate area functionality in production rates
desc: Audit and clean up all duplicate area functionality in production rates.

title: Salesperson-signature token: support HTML/coded email signatures
desc: Enhance the {salesperson-signature} token to render clean HTML/coded signatures, not just plain text.

title: Validate reply-email field when using custom email domain
desc: When a company configures a Custom Email Domain, validate that the Reply Email in Settings matches to prevent delivery failures.
notes: Jeremy posted this in the channel explicitly noting: 'I think this one came from another channel, so I'm tossing it in here for visibility.' Jesus confirmed: 'This one came from Rick.' Not a Tanner-initiated request — was already in ClickUp before it appeared here.

title: Move/link Acorn Financing from Payments tab in Settings for discoverability
desc: Acorn Financing modal is buried at the bottom of Integrations. Move or link from the Payments tab.

title: Investigate slow loading of attachments/CompanyCam when proposal opens
desc: When a proposal is first opened, attachments and CompanyCam photos load slowly. Investigate and optimize.

title: Win/Ask Automation Flow based on deal value milestones
desc: Implement an automated Win/Ask flow triggered by deal value milestones, with tailored email and SMS at each tier.

title: "Request Review" button in Jobs Pipeline Command Center
desc: Add a button in the Jobs Pipeline Command Center that lets users send a review request (text and/or email) at any pipeline stage.

title: Packaged pricing (Good/Better/Best) in Proposal Builder
desc: Allow contractors to present Good/Better/Best pricing packages within a single proposal so customers can compare and select.

title: Stripe Tap to Pay integration research
desc: Explore Stripe Terminal's Tap to Pay (iPhone/Android contactless payments) — no extra hardware required.

title: Add hover action menus to invoice and proposal bars on deal card
desc: Add hover action menus to invoice and proposal bars on the deal card for quicker access to key actions.

title: Allow sending invoices in all payment states
desc: Allow users to send/re-send invoices regardless of payment state — open, partially paid, paid, or voided.

title: In-app Calendly demo booking buttons for Job Costing, Production Rates & Zapier
desc: Add a 'Book a Free Demo' button within Job Costing UI, Production Rates UI, and Zapier integration area linking to Calendly. Greenlit by Tanner; coordinated between Jeremy and Laura C. Calendly links TBD.
notes: Owner: Jeremy + Laura C. Calendly links needed from Laura before dev handoff.

title: Invoice Activity Log with Timestamped Payment Events
desc: Log every invoice payment event (sent, viewed, paid, partial payment, refund) with timestamps, surfaced directly in the invoice record for full audit trail.
notes: Status in ClickUp: Long Term Parking

title: Post-Payment Onboarding Scheduling Flow for Cold Signups
desc: After a cold signup completes payment, trigger an automated flow to schedule an onboarding call — reducing activation drop-off.
notes: Considering combined flow

title: Include Deal ID / Job ID in All Zapier Trigger Payloads
desc: Every Zapier trigger should expose the Deal ID and Job ID in the payload so downstream Zaps can map and route correctly without workarounds.
notes: Status in ClickUp: Long Term Parking

title: Payment Received Zapier Trigger
desc: New Zapier trigger: fires when a payment is received on a DripJobs invoice. Enables downstream automation for thank-you flows, accounting sync, etc.
notes: Status in ClickUp: Short Term Parking

title: Add Payment Voiding Capability with Transaction History Tracking
desc: Allow users to void payments in DripJobs with a full audit trail — timestamped transaction history showing original payment, void event, and outcome.
notes: Status in ClickUp: Short Term Parking

title: Restrict Deletion of Proposal-Based & Change Order Discounts from Invoices
desc: Discounts that are auto-applied from accepted proposals or change orders should be locked on the invoice and not manually deletable, preventing billing errors.
notes: Already tracked in ClickUp as Ready for Dev — was in the engineering queue prior to this ticket being raised.

title: Alternative Payment Instructions Not Displayed When Stripe Enabled
desc: When Stripe is enabled as a payment option, the alternative payment instructions set in Settings were not being shown to customers on the invoice/proposal page.

title: Metrics vs Job Costing Dashboard Mismatch — Carters Painting (#16198)
desc: Numbers in the Metrics dashboard do not match totals shown in the Job Costing dashboard. Active investigation underway for account #16198.
notes: Status in ClickUp: In Progress (Terry)

title: Salesperson Field Returns Null in Zapier "Proposal Accepted" Trigger — Regression
desc: After a prior fix, the Salesperson field regressed and again returns null in the "Proposal Accepted" Zapier trigger payload, breaking downstream automations.

title: Add percentage-based pricing increase option in edit package modal
desc: Allow users to set package pricing as a percentage increase based on the previous package's total when editing packages. This would involve detecting preceding packages and providing a percentage input option.
notes: Decision: Enhance the Duplicate Package Flow with a Modal

title: Complete UI refresh for remaining outdated pages
desc: Identify and update all app pages that haven't received the UI refresh, including products/services and work order list pages. Some tickets may already exist for specific pages.
notes: UI Refresh Audit can be found in Dripjobs | Prod Reports. Starting w/ Products / Services

title: Draft proposals visible in customer portal before being sent
desc: Customers can see draft proposals in their portal even when only one proposal has been sent. This appears to be a regression from the new customer portal rollout.
resolvedNote: Pushed to Production (but looks to have resurfaced)
notes: Jesus Rubio: I think this is part of the rollout of the new customer portal. Probably that check wasn't implemented.

title: Package tiers description not showing in work order + whoops error
desc: Work orders show a whoops error before acceptance and missing package descriptions after acceptance. This affects the core work order functionality.

title: Dynamic time display not updating for scheduled sends
desc: The UI shows incorrect relative time for scheduled sends - displaying 'tomorrow' when it should show 'today'. The time display needs to update dynamically based on current time.
notes: Sent to Dev

title: AI line item description generator for proposal builder
desc: Add AI-powered description generator for proposal line items using Claude API with custom prompting for contractor services. Include save as template functionality.
